text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 105 

MDCR_PTD_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare — Part D Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in Medicare 
Part D. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare PTD enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable using the MBSF monthly Part D Contract ID variable. We count all months 
where the PTD_CNTRCT_ID_MM
